{"ready":true,"plan_summary":"Create the rate-limit middleware, export it, wire it into the route stack, and run the verification script.","final_response":"Rate limiting middleware added to the auth module.","questions":[],"actions":[{"id":"create-rate-limit-middleware","title":"Create rate-limit middleware file","task":"Create packages/server/src/middleware/rate-limit.ts with an in-memory per-IP rate limiter object and a rateLimit middleware function that tracks request counts per IP and rejects requests exceeding the limit.","depends_on":null,"allowed_tools":[],"target_paths":["packages/server/src/middleware/rate-limit.ts"]},{"id":"update-middleware-index","title":"Export rateLimit from middleware index","task":"Update packages/server/src/middleware/index.ts to add the named export `export { rateLimit }` alongside the existing authGuard export.","depends_on":["create-rate-limit-middleware"],"allowed_tools":[],"target_paths":["packages/server/src/middleware/index.ts"]},{"id":"wire-rate-limit-to-routes","title":"Wire rateLimit into API route stack","task":"Update packages/server/src/routes/api.ts to import rateLimit from './middleware' and apply it before authGuard in the handleApiRequest withMiddleware chain.","depends_on":["update-middleware-index"],"allowed_tools":[],"target_paths":["packages/server/src/routes/api.ts"]},{"id":"run-verify-script","title":"Run verification script","task":"Execute ./scripts/verify-rate-limit.sh to confirm the rate limiting implementation meets the contract.","depends_on":["wire-rate-limit-to-routes"],"allowed_tools":[],"command":"./scripts/verify-rate-limit.sh"}]}

args.content:
export { authGuard } from "./auth-guard"
export { rateLimit } from "./rate-limit"
